source_name: AEMO NEM operational demand by region

fields.demand_basis: Operational demand = total scheduled and semi-scheduled generation plus net imports, less transmission losses. Excludes behind-the-meter rooftop solar self-consumption (which is netted off operational demand). Cross-reference DCCEEW total final consumption for end-use comparable totals.
fields.primary_source_document: AEMO Data Dashboard; QED full-year edition; OpenNEM regional pages.
fields.keying_plan: Key annual operational-demand TWh per region from AEMO QED. Key peak demand MW separately and label clearly (peak ≠ annual).

notes: Awaiting hand-keyed annual operational demand TWh per region plus peak MW. Operational demand and total final consumption are different metrics; do not conflate.
citation: AEMO Quarterly Energy Dynamics; AEMO Data Dashboard.
